ham: Dear patient, this is a reminder that your appointment with Dr. Sharma is scheduled for 3:00 PM on 12th May. Please arrive 10 minutes early. Reply YES to confirm or NO to cancel. Thank you.
spam: Hi! Your phone’s eSIM is about to expire. Upgrade now to avoid service interruption. Click <URL> for a special 50% discount. Offer valid till 5 pm today. Act fast!
